heading: Where you start depends on experience, not age

categories.name: Discover Scuba
categories.description: A single supervised introductory dive, no certification needed — good for testing the waters, literally.

categories.name: Open Water Certification
categories.description: A 3–4 day course leading to your first real certification, valid worldwide.

categories.name: Advanced Open Water
categories.description: Deeper dives, night dives, and navigation — opens up more of the Maldives' channel and drift sites.

categories.name: Rescue & Divemaster
categories.description: For divers wanting to go further — rescue skills or a path toward working as a dive professional.
